description: Using the 'food.gdt' dataset open in Gretl, perform an Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) regression with 'food_exp' (weekly food expenditure) as the dependent variable and 'income' (weekly income) as the independent variable. Export the model results to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/ols_results.txt.

metadata.data_source: Hill, Griffiths, Lim - Principles of Econometrics 5th ed, household survey data
